title: cyperus melanospermus subsp. melanospermus
intro: Cyperus melanospermus subsp. melanospermus, also known as Black Sedge, is a type of flowering plant in the sedge family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. The Black Sedge is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine in some parts of the world.
